steps.title: Use a fast Desmos setup
steps.content: Because the two $x$-values are $c$ and $2c$, the actual positive value of $c$ only stretches the graph horizontally. For a quick Desmos check, choose $c=1$. Then the points become $(1,7)$ and $(2,117)$, and the function has the form $y=ux-b$, where $u=ac$.

steps.title: Read the regression result
steps.content: Desmos returns $u=110$ and $b=103$. Since $u$ stands for $ac$, this says $ac=110$ and directly gives the requested value $b=103$.

steps.title: Confirm by algebra
steps.content: The hand solution is short too: substituting the two points gives $$ac-b=7$$ and $$2ac-b=117.$$ Subtract the first equation from the second to get $ac=110$. Then $110-b=7$, so $b=103$. That matches choice C.
